title: viola adunca var. cascadensis
intro: Viola adunca var. cascadensis, also known as the western or early dog violet, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Viola adunca var. cascadensis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
